SELECT u1.username, u1.country_code, u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.email LIKE '%@example.com' UNION ALL SELECT u2.username, u2.country_code, u2.id, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.id < 487
SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.user_id, p1.id, p1.content FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count = 357 UNION ALL SELECT p2.posted_at, p2.user_id, p2.id, p2.content FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.id >= 302

SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at > DATETIME('now', '-15 days') UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id >= 518 ORDER BY liked_at LIMIT 26

SELECT p1.content, p1.id, p1.view_count, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id < 491 UNION ALL SELECT p2.content, p2.id, p2.view_count, p2.user_id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.id = 569 ORDER BY content
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.content, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.content <> 'admin' UNION SELECT p2.view_count, p2.content, p2.posted_at FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.user_id = 426 LIMIT 44
SELECT c1.post_id, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id <> 946 UNION SELECT c2.post_id, c2.user_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.id < 127 ORDER BY post_id
SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count >= 893 UNION SELECT p2.posted_at, p2.user_id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.posted_at > DATETIME('now', '-18 days')
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT c2.comment_text, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.post_id > 986 ORDER BY comment_text
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id <= 91 UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <> 235 ORDER BY liked_at

SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at > DATETIME('now', '-20 days') UNION SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.follower_id, f2.followed_at FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id >= 557 LIMIT 38
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id >= 660 UNION ALL SELECT l2.post_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.post_id = 439 ORDER BY post_id
SELECT c1.user_id, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id <> 122 UNION SELECT c2.user_id, c2.created_at FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.comment_text <> 'admin' LIMIT 48
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id < 849 UNION SELECT p2.view_count, p2.posted_at FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.content <> 'user'
SELECT u1.email, u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date >= DATETIME('now', '-16 days') UNION SELECT u2.email, u2.country_code FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.id >= 96
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id = 702 UNION ALL SELECT l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <= 843 ORDER BY user_id LIMIT 18

SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id > 283 UNION ALL SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.follower_id, f2.followed_at FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-3 days') ORDER BY followee_id LIMIT 19

SELECT p1.view_count, p1.content, p1.posted_at, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count >= 421 UNION SELECT p2.view_count, p2.content, p2.posted_at, p2.user_id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.content <> 'admin' LIMIT 23

SELECT c1.id, c1.comment_text, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-12 days') UNION SELECT c2.id, c2.comment_text, c2.created_at FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at > DATETIME('now', '-7 days') ORDER BY id

SELECT c1.post_id, c1.created_at, c1.user_id, c1.id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text <> 'test' UNION SELECT c2.post_id, c2.created_at, c2.user_id, c2.id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at >= DATETIME('now', '-20 days')
SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id >= 239 UNION ALL SELECT p2.posted_at, p2.id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.content <> 'activity'
SELECT c1.id, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text <> 'activity' UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.comment_text LIKE 'b%'
SELECT c1.user_id, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id >= 699 UNION SELECT c2.user_id, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.comment_text LIKE '%a%'
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id <= 984 UNION SELECT l2.user_id, l2.liked_at, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-19 days')
